summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dekorix landing page. Backend APIs working perfectly (6/6 tests passed). Frontend UI loads correctly with all sections visible. Critical issue found: quote form submission not working - no network requests made when form submitted.

ui_bugs.issue: İletişim navigation link has incorrect testid due to Turkish character encoding

integration_issues.issue: Form submission not working - no network requests made to backend API when form is submitted

passed_tests: Backend quote by ID retrieval (200 OK)
Homepage loading and hero section display
Navigation links (3/4 working - İletişim has encoding issue)
API connectivity from browser (direct fetch works)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix quote form submission - form is not making any network requests to backend API when submitted. All form fields can be filled but clicking submit button does not trigger any API calls. Backend API is working correctly (tested independently). Issue appears to be in frontend JavaScript form handling or event listeners.
